sense.serverInstructions:
ALWAYS prefer Sense tools over Grep/Glob/Read for structural and semantic code questions. Sense provides pre-indexed results that are faster and more complete.

WHEN TO USE SENSE TOOLS:
- Symbol relationships, callers, dependencies → sense_graph
- "What would break if I changed X?", impact analysis → sense_blast
- Conceptual/semantic code search (not exact string match) → sense_search
- Project patterns and conventions → sense_conventions
- Index health, what's indexed → sense_status

WHEN NOT TO USE SENSE TOOLS:
- Exact text/string search → use grep
- Reading file contents → use your file reading tool
- Editing code → Sense is read-only
